title: helichrysum neoachyroclinoides
intro: Helichrysum neoachyroclinoides, also known as the mountaineverlastings or mountaineverlast, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum neoachyroclinoides include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress. Helichrysum neoachyroclinoides can be consumed as a tea, used as a supplement, or incorporated into topical herbal preparations, such as creams and oils, to harness its medicinal properties.
